chunks.title: God's Promise to Moses and Israel
chunks.reason: A cohesive speech where God reaffirms the covenant and promises deliverance, followed by the people's initial reaction.

chunks.title: Moses' Objection and God's Command
chunks.reason: A dialogue sequence where Moses questions his ability to speak to Pharaoh and God issues a direct command to him and Aaron.

chunks.title: Genealogy of the Patriarchs and Levites
chunks.reason: A detailed list of family lines for Reuben, Simeon, and Levi, including specific names and lifespans.

chunks.title: Moses and Aaron Commissioned Again
chunks.reason: A narrative conclusion identifying Moses and Aaron as the chosen leaders and recording a final exchange regarding their speech.
